ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the model */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the model */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was analyzed */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., linear regression, logistic regression) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coefficients" (
  "coef_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coefficient */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the coefficient belongs to */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean of the coefficient */,
  "sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of the coefficient */,
  "mc_error" REAL /* Monte Carlo error of the coefficient */,
  "hpd_2_5" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% high posterior density interval */,
  "hpd_97_5" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% high posterior density interval */,
  "n_eff" INTEGER /* Effective sample size */,
  "rhat" REAL /* R-hat value (potential scale reduction factor) */,
  "prior_mean" REAL /* Mean of the prior distribution for the coefficient */,
  "prior_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of the prior distribution for the coefficient */,
  "posterior_mean" REAL /* Mean of the posterior distribution for the coefficient */,
  "posterior_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of the posterior distribution for the coefficient */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coef_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coefficients_variable_name FOREIGN KEY ("variable_name") REFERENCES variables ("variable_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coefficients_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coefficients_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., survey, public database) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is distributed */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the dataset has been accessed */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Last date the dataset was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model or dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the variable in the dataset */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the variable in the dataset */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the variable in the dataset */,
  "std_dev_value" REAL /* Standard deviation of the variable in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)
